backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the chat application backend with types and state for messages, chatrooms, user profiles, reactions, and active users, plus authorization, blob storage, and HTTP outcall integrations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three UI features (quoted reply previews inside bubbles, always-visible icon-only action buttons, removal of below-input character counter) to their affected frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Cached summaries of all frontend source files describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app with viewport meta tags, cache-busting headers, and a versioned script tag loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom (with messageId search param), and admin routes, hiding the header and footer on admin pages and the footer on chatroom pages.
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component allowing users to pick an avatar by uploading an image, removing the current avatar, or selecting a GIF from a Giphy search or trending feed.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat interface component that renders messages, handles sending, reply context, auto-scroll to bottom, and scroll-to-highlighted-message for deep-linked message IDs, while filtering out media-less Creator messages.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Displays a chatroom card with thumbnail previews for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter media, live status badges, and metadata like participant count and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Modal dialog for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (image upload, video URL, or Twitter post).
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Confirmation dialog that warns users before navigating to an external URL, displaying the target link and Cancel/Continue buttons.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, back-to-lobby navigation when inside a chatroom, and an inline username/avatar editor.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing; authentication is intentionally not used in this app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders a single chat message with support for reactions, pinning, replies, URL link detection, embedded media (YouTube/Twitch/Twitter/Giphy), voice playback, and reporting.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat input component supporting text messages, image uploads, GIF search via Giphy, voice recording, and automatic detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs in typed text.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Renders a pinned YouTube or Twitch video embed within a chatroom, with an unpin button that calls the useUnpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: Audio player component for voice messages that displays a waveform visualization, play/pause controls, a seek slider, and pauses other playing audio instances.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay, returning the latest settled value after the delay period.
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: Hook that purges stale or empty cached chatroom data and forces a fresh refetch of the chatrooms query once the actor becomes ready, exposing a recovery-in-progress flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity, status) via a React context provider and hook, backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file covering chatroom listing/search/filtering, message fetching, sending, reactions, image upload, and video pinning/unpinning mutations against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens), and includes mobile-specific input styles and custom voice message range input styling.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatCompactNumber` that formats numbers into compact human-readable strings (k, M, B suffixes).
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy by term and fetch trending GIFs, returning normalized `GiphyGif` arrays using the configured API key.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for lazy-loading the html2canvas library.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using a canvas, with configurable max dimensions, quality, and optional progress callback.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for Twitter embed rendering logic.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe preview fields (author, text, image) with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: localStorage cache layer for Twitter oEmbed preview data, supporting versioned entries with a 7-day expiration and cache-key derivation from tweet IDs.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for Twitter thumbnail fetching logic.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail caching layer.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility module with functions to extract video/clip IDs and generate thumbnail/embed URLs for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter/X links.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with React Query, Internet Identity, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin moderation page that lists chatrooms with flagged message counts, supports filtering/searching, and allows deletion of individual chatrooms via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, increments its view count on mount, handles loading/error states, and renders the ChatArea component with an optional target message for deep-linking.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page displaying all chatrooms with client-side search, category filtering, and algorithmic sorting (live rooms first, then by view count and creation date), plus a dialog to create new chatrooms.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Chattr app at version 348, tracking three pending feature requests: moving quoted replies inside chat bubbles, making action buttons always visible with icons only, and removing the below-input character counter.
